checkExposureDesc: Enter an email or a company domain. We'll generate a real-time exposure report and show masked samples when available.
correlatedResults: Correlated results across breach sources are summarized below.
noSamplesFoundDesc: Good news! We didn't find specific leak samples in our public subset.
noSamplesAvailableDesc: No preview data available for this category.
newSearchDesc: Enter an email or company domain to detect your dark web exposure in seconds.
protectAccountsDesc: Secure your email and social logins. Create a free account to uncover full details.
protectCustomersDesc: Exposure of customer accounts can lead to churn. Monitor breaches to maintain trust.
safeguardCompanyDesc: Corporate credential leaks put employees at risk. Start monitoring now.
securityDisclaimer: These insights reflect infostealer infections and leaked credentials found in our public dataset. Rotate passwords, enable MFA, and keep monitoring for new signals.
